artPrompt: A hefty mutant snapping turtle hauling itself onto a slick of bioluminescent green sludge, three baleful eyes glinting above a hooked beak, its mossy rust-pitted shell crusted with toxic algae and clinging litter. It intends to outlive a fifth mayor. Rusted pipes and bubbling muck frame it under a bruised stormy sky. The vigilant turtle anchors the central wide frame, glow rising behind. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Three-Eyed Snapping Turtle
text:
Vigilance
Whenever a player rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, you may have Three-Eyed Snapping Turtle deal 1 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. The third eye never misses, the snap never warns.
flavorText: It has outlived four mayors and intends to outlive a fifth.
